note: ONE promotion gate exists, welded to ONE class; keep spine + swap per-class metric panel. The methodological keystone.

claim: EXTENDS shadow-scoring gate (H/M): ONE gate = the existing feedback gate's SPINE (20% deterministic holdout selectHoldoutQueries, >=2 non-regressing cycles, promote/wait/rollback, audit ledger) + a swappable per-class metric panel. Today welded to ONE class — is_improvement hardcodes meanNdcgDelta>MIN_NDCG_IMPROVEMENT (shadow-scoring.ts:547-574,690).

NET-NEW (H/M): CLASS-G metric panel (ECE+Brier+precision/recall/FP) is the missing precondition keeping isotonic frozen at opt-in. No calibration metric exists (rank-metrics.ts:32-45 = Kendall/NDCG/MRR only); rank-delta is orthogonal to calibration reliability. Houses wave-2 A2 ECE inside the gate.

NET-NEW (H/M): the gate is STRUCTURALLY BLIND to new-channel/recall candidates — compareRanks (rank-metrics.ts:245-261) records a delta ONLY where the item has BOTH live and shadow rank, so a candidate the live set LACKED (trigger union, fused-summary) contributes ZERO to ndcgDelta. Measures REORDER of the intersection, not recall ADDITIONS. CLASS-C needs recall-delta@k over the UNION + FP-rate + cost. Trigger shadow emits precursors (semantic-trigger-matcher.ts:492-501) ungated.

EXTENDS 027 doctrine (M/S): encode promote-on-evidence as the flag-symbol lifecycle — candidate at isOptInEnabled (OFF) -> gate promote after >=2 clean cycles authorizes graduation to isFeatureEnabled (ON) -> rollback re-demotes. The ONE loop unifying 3 bespoke shadow mechanisms (feedback=gate+cycles; trigger=stats-no-gate; calibration=flag-no-metric). Stranded shadow: learned Stage2 combiner 'computed but NOT used, shadow-only' no promote path (search-flags.ts:517).

EXTENDS shadow-eval-runtime (M/M): route the gate's held-out labels through the 110-query golden set instead of adaptive_signal_events (returns empty map when signals cancel -> silently skips cycles, the phantom-proxy problem for CLASS-G, shadow-evaluation-runtime.ts:158-163). Bridges unified gate <-> eval harness.
maps_to: A1, A2 label-starved classes; connects gate<->harness
